news.post_title: Ranking the Prospects Traded During the 2023 Deadline
Braves Add to Bullpen With Trades for Pierce Johnson, Taylor Hearn

news.headline: Poor showing in eighth loss
news.news: Gordon (6-8) took the loss Wednesday against the Mariners, allowing seven runs (five earned) on eight hits and no walks in 3.1 innings. He struck out three.
